description_long: This is a large, rectangular industrial dumpster with sloped front walls and reinforced vertical and horizontal ribbing along its sides. The exterior is painted a muted yellow with visible signs of wear and weathering, suggesting frequent outdoor use. The open top provides easy access for depositing bulky waste, while the solid metal construction ensures durability and resistance to heavy loads. The base features a series of raised ridges, likely for forklift compatibility or stability on uneven ground. There are no visible handles, wheels, or lids, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding large volumes of refuse or construction debris.
description: A large, open-topped yellow metal dumpster with reinforced sides and a sloped front, designed for heavy-duty waste collection.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, open top with sloped walls and a reinforced rim, emphasizing easy access for loading.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical and horizontal ribbing for structural support and the sloped front edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a flat, solid back wall with no openings or handles, and the rectangular shape of the container.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the first side, showing the same ribbed reinforcement and sloped front.
